payload.answer: I could not remember the article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error. I can only note that the user wanted to remember the URL for memory architecture, but not the article’s claims.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no durable article claims or summary can be safely created.

details: No durable memory card was created to avoid inventing source claims.

repair_options: Ask to save only the URL and stated purpose without article content.
